physcThis finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-09-19 18:12:12 UTC.12/07/2018
This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor) >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab
English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Arthur L. Bloom papers
Bloom, Arthur L. (Arthur Leroy), 1928-
16-14-4167
8.1 cubic feet. 8.1 cubic feet.
1960-1971. Slides, correspondence, research materials, reports, publications. Files relating to the Cornell Geology Department, especially department meetings and curriculum changes. Collection material in English 8796933
Vanuatu Photos 1974-1981
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
Mikaela Hamilton
Date completed:
October 2018
EAD encoding:
RMC Staff, October 2018
Date modified:
Marcie Farwell, November 2018
BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
Professor Emeritus, Earth and Atmospheric Sciences.
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Files relating to the Cornell Geology Department, especially department meetings and curriculum changes.
SERIES LIST
Series I. Slides
Series II. Research Materials and Publications
Series III. Career, Public Outreach, Personal
Series IV. Geology administrative documents
Cite As:
Arthur L. Bloom Papers, #16-14-4167. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Geologists. Geology -- Study and teaching. Cornell University. Department of Geology Cornell University -- : Faculty.

Scope and Contents
Contains fossil fastened with tape to foil and paper "award" for Dr. Bloom; personal correspondence; poem by Eleanor Kleinhaus; newspaper clippings; photosCornell's Adult University (CAU) Folder 3199988Cornell's Adult University (CAU) Folder 4200189Cornell's Adult University (CAU) - Folder 5; future overseas trip1999-2000810Community courses and correspondence1999-2000811Senior citizen field trips2001812Senior citizens local geology1998-03-03-1998-03-24813Cornell talks1998-1999814Community and university volunteering Folder 12001-2005815Community and university volunteering Folder 22005-2009816"Fan mail"2011-2013817Career reports and materials; public outreach1961-1995818Retirement and correspondence1994-1999819Travel 1990-19911990-1991820Travel 1991-19921991-1992821Travel, etc. 1992-19931992-1993822Travel, etc. 1993-19941993-1994823Travel, etc. 1994-19951994-1995824Series IV. Scope and Contents
Contains fossil fastened with tape to foil and paper "award" for Dr. Bloom; personal correspondence; poem by Eleanor Kleinhaus; newspaper clippings; photosCornell's Adult University (CAU) Folder 3199988Cornell's Adult University (CAU) Folder 4200189Cornell's Adult University (CAU) - Folder 5; future overseas trip1999-2000810Community courses and correspondence1999-2000811Senior citizen field trips2001812Senior citizens local geology1998-03-03-1998-03-24813Cornell talks1998-1999814Community and university volunteering Folder 12001-2005815Community and university volunteering Folder 22005-2009816"Fan mail"2011-2013817Career reports and materials; public outreach1961-1995818Retirement and correspondence1994-1999819Travel 1990-19911990-1991820Travel 1991-19921991-1992821Travel, etc. 1992-19931992-1993822Travel, etc. 1993-19941993-1994823Travel, etc. 1994-19951994-1995824Series IV.
